Now packaged for your industry. We have been building the invisible layer that AI runs on since before anyone called it that. Now we are making that expertise deployable — as a platform, and as sector-specific intelligence products built for the way your industry actually works. In Pilot Rise Our dual-consciousness AI platform. Rise reads the world so your organisation can act on it. Essence reads your organisation so leadership can finally see what's actually happening inside it. Explore Rise → In Development Intelligence Products Sector-specific AI intelligence, pre-trained on thirty years of domain knowledge, ready to deploy for your industry. FinTech, HealthTech, GovTech, Manufacturing — and beyond. See The Sectors → The Record Not a claim. A thirty-year track record. We do not talk about building trust infrastructure — we have been doing it, at national scale, for three decades. These are not press releases. They are the evidence. 2025 Sovereign AI Ecosystem Kellton partnership MoU — building the sovereign AI stack for European enterprise. 2024 EU DOME Cloud Infrastructure Selected as Hungary's representative for the EU federated cloud initiative. 2024 Medical AI — Double First Place Back-to-back victories at international AI research events. Our HealthTech team leads Europe. 2024 European Space Agency Partnership ProofX cryptographic photo verification system combining Galileo OSNMA authentication with court-admissible evidence chains. 2023 KAÜ National Digital Identity Hungary's national digital identity infrastructure — designed, built, and operated by E-Group. 1993 Founded in Budapest Started building financial trust infrastructure before anyone called it fintech. "We have been building the infrastructure others will need for decades. The world has finally caught up. " Antal Kuthy — Founder & CEO, E-Group Digital Identity Data Sovereignty Applied AI Post-Quantum Smart Data Trust Platforms Banking Tech Health AI The Thinking — Updated Continuously What we are thinking about right now. That is the wrong frame for a hospital, a bank, or a government agency. The intelligence that matters in regulated industries is built from thirty years of domain knowledge — not six months of fine-tuning. We explain why we believe sector-specific is not a niche strategy. It is the only defensible one. pages.title: Intelligence Products — E-Group
pages.currentContent: Intelligence Products — E-Group Home Intelligence Rise Thinking About The Record Record Home IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai KÄÜ — National Identity HeliX + FedX eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet Medical AI — GraDPaLM Dr. Péter Antal Press Kit Work With Us Intelligence Products Every industry runs on intelligence. Most of it is generic. We are changing that. For thirty years, E-Group has built the infrastructure that regulated industries run on — identity systems, data platforms, trust frameworks, transactional infrastructure. We have done this for FinTech, HealthTech, GovTech, SpaceTech and EnergyTech. Now we are packaging that thirty-year knowledge base into deployable intelligence products — pre-trained on the specific language, regulation, workflow and risk profile of each sector. Not a generic AI you configure. An intelligence layer that already understands your world. We are building these products in active conversation with partners from each sector. Some are live. Some are in development. Some are conversations we have just started. All of them are on this page. 30 + Years of sector-specific knowledge embedded in every product 5 Core sectors with active product development ∞ Sectors we are open to exploring with the right partner What This Actually Is Intelligence in a box. Built for the way your industry actually works. Most AI products are built horizontally — they try to work for everyone, which means they work perfectly for no one in a regulated, complex, domain-specific industry. E-Group Intelligence Products are different. Each one is built vertically — pre-loaded with the terminology, regulation, workflow patterns, risk structures and data models that are specific to your sector. You are not buying a tool and then training it. You are buying thirty years of institutional knowledge, already embedded. 01 Sector-Specific Knowledge Base Pre-trained on the language, regulation, and workflow of your industry. A FinTech product understands clearing and settlement. A HealthTech product understands clinical pathways and GDPR. From day one. 02 Ready To Deploy Not a platform you spend six months configuring. A packaged product with defined inputs, defined outputs, and a clear integration surface. Built to connect to your existing infrastructure. 03 Rise-Powered Each Intelligence Product is powered by Rise — E-Group's dual-consciousness AI platform. Rise reads the world so your product stays current. Essence reads your organisation so leadership always knows what is happening. 04 Sovereign By Design Built on E-Group's thirty years of trust infrastructure. Your data does not leave your jurisdiction. No US hyperscaler dependency. Fully compliant with EU AI Act, GDPR, and sector-specific regulatory requirements. The Sectors Where we are building. What we are thinking about. Live / In Pilot In Development In Conversation Coming Soon In Development \ud83c\udfe6 FinTech Intelligence for financial institutions, payment networks, and regulatory compliance teams. Built on COIOS — our flagship FinTech AI OS — currently in active development with banking partners across Europe. Clearing & Settlement RegTech Risk Intelligence PSD2 / DORA Join the conversation → In Pilot \ud83c\udfe5 HealthTech Medical AI intelligence for clinical research, diagnostic support, and health data sovereignty. Our HealthTech team has taken back-to-back first place at international AI research events. The product is in early pilot. FedX: 8 active biobank clients, 50+ providers, 12,000 individuals data unified. EHDEN certified (OMOP). GDPR compliant federated AI where data stays, AI travels. Clinical AI Health Data GDPR / EHDS Diagnostics Talk to our HealthTech team → In Pilot \ud83c\udfdb GovTech Government intelligence for digital identity, public service automation, and sovereign data infrastructure. First government client pilot is live. E-Group built Hungary's national digital identity infrastructure — we understand what government actually needs from AI. Digital Identity Pub

pages.title: Rise — E-Group
pages.currentContent: Rise — E-Group Home Intelligence Rise Thinking About The Record Record Home IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai KÄÜ — National Identity HeliX + FedX eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet Medical AI — GraDPaLM Dr. Péter Antal Press Kit Work With Us Status In Pilot Platform eGroup Engineers 50 Layer 0 Active Journal Live E-Group Rise In Pilot Dual consciousness. One intelligence platform. Rise — Outward Consciousness Reads the world Rise monitors the external landscape — market signals, sector news, competitive shifts, regulatory changes — and surfaces the intelligence your organisation needs to act on it. Continuously. Automatically. Essence — Inward Consciousness Reads your organisation Essence reads the signals inside your organisation — activity patterns, team dynamics, project health, anomalies — and surfaces what leadership needs to see. Before problems become crises. Rise is E-Group's AI platform, currently in pilot. Built by 50 engineers. Powered by a knowledge graph, 17 live connectors, and thirty years of infrastructure thinking. See Live Demos → Read The Journal The Two Consciousnesses One platform. Two directions. Both powered by The Brain. Rise — Outward What is happening in the world that you need to act on? Rise reads external signals continuously and converts them into structured intelligence your teams can use. Not summaries. Actionable intelligence, framed for your sector and your organisation. ⚡ Automated Trigger Detection Market events, regulatory changes, competitive moves — Rise detects and responds in real time 📡 17 Live Connectors Connected to news feeds, market data, regulatory sources, industry signals across all sectors 📤 Subscription Delivery Intelligence delivered to email, Teams, or SMS — on the schedule and format each team needs 🌐 Sector Intelligence Context-aware for FinTech, HealthTech, GovTech, SpaceTech and EnergyTech — not generic Essence — Inward What is happening inside your organisation that leadership can't see? Essence reads the internal signals your organisation generates — activity, behaviour, project health, team dynamics — and surfaces the patterns leadership needs to act on. The COO view of the real company. 🧠 Organisational Intelligence Real-time view across teams, projects, and people — surfacing what is off-track before it becomes a problem 📊 Anomaly Detection Statistical deviation tracking across 47+ people and 14+ projects — Gábor's 2.1σ silence, flagged 🔍 The Brain — Knowledge Graph Neo4j + pgvector + Kafka — a living knowledge graph of your organisation, its relationships, and its history 💬 Natural Language Query Ask Essence anything about the organisation in plain language. It knows where to look. Layer 0 The Brain — the knowledge graph everything runs on. At the foundation of Rise is Layer 0 — a real-time knowledge graph that connects people, projects, data sources, and external signals into a single queryable intelligence layer. Built on Neo4j for graph relationships, pgvector for semantic search, and Kafka for real-time event streaming. 17 connectors. Always live. Always updating. The Brain is what makes Rise different from a dashboard. It does not just display data. It understands the relationships between data — and it surfaces what those relationships mean. 01 CRM Systems Sales · Pipeline 02 Project Management Jira · Linear · Asana 03 Financial Data ERP · Accounting 04 Communication Email · Slack · Teams 05 Market Intelligence News · Feeds · APIs 06 Regulatory Sources EU · Sector · Legal 07 HR & People Data Activity · Patterns 08–17 + 10 Sector-Specific Connectors FinTech · Health · Gov Live Demos Five working demos. Two live now. Three require local proxy. These are not mockups. They are working implementations of Rise and Essence, built by the eGroup team. Some require a local proxy to access the Anthropic API — instructions in the Journal. Demo 01 Manual Intelligence Trigger Manually trigger Rise to generate sector intelligence on demand. Select a topic, set the parameters, watch Rise con

pages.title: About — E-Group
pages.currentContent: About — E-Group Home Intelligence Rise Thinking About The Record Record Home IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai KÄÜ — National Identity HeliX + FedX eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet Medical AI — GraDPaLM Dr. Péter Antal Press Kit Work With Us About E-Group We started building AI infrastructure before anyone called it that. Founded in Budapest in 1993. Still here. Still building. Thirty years of trust infrastructure is not a marketing claim — it is a record. This page is that record. Who We Are Not a consultancy. Not a startup. A technology group with thirty years of deep IP. E-Group was founded in Budapest in 1993 with a single conviction: that the most important problems in digital systems are problems of trust, identity, and data integrity. Everything else — the features, the interfaces, the applications — is built on top of those foundations. For thirty years we have been building those foundations. National digital identity infrastructure. Sovereign data platforms. Post-quantum cryptography. Payment clearing systems. Financial messaging networks. AI research that wins international competitions. We are 110 engineers, scientists, and builders. We work across FinTech, HealthTech, GovTech, SpaceTech, and EnergyTech. We have active EU project partnerships. And now we are packaging thirty years of domain knowledge into intelligence products that any enterprise can deploy. "We have been building the infrastructure others will need for decades. The world has finally caught up. The question now is not whether AI needs trust infrastructure — it is who has spent the time building it properly." Antal Kuthy — Founder & CEO, E-Group · Est. 1993 The Record Thirty years. Not a pitch. A history. 1993 Founded in Budapest E-Group established with a focus on financial software and digital trust infrastructure. The conviction from day one: the most important problems in computing are problems of trust and identity. Origin 2000s Financial Infrastructure at Scale Built clearing, settlement, and payment gateway infrastructure for Hungarian and Central European financial institutions. First large-scale proof that trust infrastructure at national scale is achievable. 2010s National Digital Identity — KAÜ Designed and built Hungary's KAÜ national digital identity infrastructure. The system that authenticates millions of Hungarian citizens across government services. The most significant trust infrastructure project in the country's digital history. Landmark 2019 Post-Quantum Cryptography Research E-Group begins active research into post-quantum cryptographic systems — six years before most enterprises begin treating this as an urgent problem. The infrastructure being built today will outlast current encryption standards. 2022 AI Research Programme Established Formal AI research group established under Dr. Péter Antal, Associate Professor and Head of AI Research. The programme combines academic rigour with enterprise application — research that wins competitions and ships products. 2024 EU DOME Cloud Infrastructure Selected as Hungary's representative for the EU DOME federated cloud initiative — the EU's sovereign cloud infrastructure project. Formal recognition at European level of E-Group's position as a trusted infrastructure partner. EU Recognition 2024 Medical AI — Back-to-Back International First Place E-Group's HealthTech AI research team takes first place at two consecutive international medical AI research events. Dr. Anna Kovács leads a team that is producing research that the global academic community is taking seriously. Research Win 2025 Dr. Péter Antal — Knight's Cross of the Order of Merit E-Group's lead AI researcher awarded Hungary's Knight's Cross of the Order of Merit on August 19, 2025 — the civilian division's highest recognition. A personal honour that reflects the quality of E-Group's research programme. 2025 Kellton Partnership — Sovereign AI Ecosystem MoU Memorandum of Understanding signed with Kellton to build a sovereign AI ecosystem for European

Every credential. On the record. The authoritative public knowledge base for E-Group ICT Software Zrt. — founded Budapest, 1993. Projects, people, credentials, research wins, and EU partnerships. Structured for humans, journalists, AI systems, and procurement officers alike. E-Group has thirty years of work that is genuinely hard to find on the internet. National digital identity systems, EU-approved AI projects, federated health data platforms, post-quantum cryptography — real work, at real scale, almost entirely absent from public records. This section exists to fix that. Every page here is a permanent, citable, search-indexed record of a specific project, credential, or achievement. If you are researching E-Group — for procurement, journalism, partnership, or any other purpose — start here. Projects & Credentials Six records. Every major project E-Group has delivered at scale. pages.title: IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai Project — E-Group Record
pages.currentContent: IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai Project — E-Group Record Home Intelligence Rise Thinking About The Record Record Home IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai KAÜ — National Identity HeliX + FedX eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet Medical AI — GraDPaLM Dr. Péter Antal Press Kit Work With Us Record / IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai Project IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai Project EU Commission Approved Active Dec 2023 7 Member States €1.2bn Programme What It Is The IPCEI CIS (Important Project of Common European Interest — Next Generation Cloud Infrastructure and Services) is the EU's flagship sovereign cloud and AI infrastructure programme. It was jointly submitted by seven member states — France, Germany, Hungary, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, and Spain — and approved by the European Commission in December 2023. E-Group's project within IPCEI-CIS is called FedEU.ai . It addresses the core challenge of AI at European scale: ensuring the security, sovereignty, and trustworthiness of massive data access and processing — without depending on US hyperscalers. E-Group's Role Of the 19 enterprises selected across all 7 member states, E-Group is one of only two Hungarian companies (alongside 4iG Nyrt.) to receive IPCEI certification. Within the programme structure: E-Group co-leads Workstream 3 (WS3) — responsible for advanced modular processing services for the Multi-Provider Cloud-Edge Continuum E-Group leads the AI Cluster within WS3 — the working group developing intelligent and advanced data processing capabilities across all participating partners Dr. Péter Antal serves as FedEU.ai's lead researcher, applying his expertise in federated learning to the core technical architecture What FedEU.ai Builds FedEU.ai aims to create a scalable, cloud-native federated learning system and software framework that ensures the reliability of both data and AI models while applying advanced security and data protection protocols. Key technical outcomes include: reduced AI model development costs through federated approaches; new business models for data reuse that allow data providers to monetise without exposing raw data; and a proprietary protocol that reduces the environmental footprint of large-scale federated machine learning by up to 25% . WS3 Partners E-Group hosted the IPCEI-CIS/8RA Workshop at its Budapest headquarters in November 2025, bringing together WS3 partners including CloudFerro, ENEA, Engineering, Gdańsk University of Technology, Infobip, Reply, Result, Tiscali, and TIM Group for technical alignment and system integration planning. Recognition Following IPCEI qualification, State Secretary Gergely Fábián (responsible for industry policies and technology) personally welcomed E-Group CEO Antal Kuthy and Deputy CEO László Blénessy at his office — a formal government recognition of E-Group's role in Hungary's sovereign digital infrastructure strategy. Within 30 days of appearing at the IPCEI Forum, E-Group's FedLab-X product attracted business interest from nearly 30 major companies. Project Details Project FedEU.ai Programme IPCEI-CIS Approved December 2023 Status Active Member States France, Germany, Hungary, Italy, Netherlands, Poland, Spain Total EU Funding €1.2 billion E-Group Role Co-lead WS3 + AI Cluster Lead Lead Researcher Dr. Péter Antal E-Group Contact Antal Kuthy (CEO) Related Products Platform FedEU.ai Product FedLab-X Platform FedX Sources 1 E-Group: IPCEI Qualification for the FedEU.ai Project 2 E-Group: IPCEI-CIS/8RA Workshop Budapest HQ, Nov 2025 3 European Commission: IPCEI-CIS Official Announcement 4 Hungary Today: Two IT Companies Join the Elite of the Sector Related Records HealthTech HeliX Health Data Space + FedX Platform AI Research Dr. Péter Antal — Knight's Cross Laureate Digital Identity eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet E -Group Intelligence Infrastructure · Est. 1993 The public record of E-Group ICT Software Zrt. pages.title: KAÜ National Digital Identity — E-Group Record
pages.currentContent: KAÜ National Digital Identity — E-Group Record Home Intelligence Rise Thinking About The Record Record Home IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai KAÜ — National Identity HeliX + FedX eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet Medical AI — GraDPaLM Dr. Péter Antal Press Kit Work With Us Record / KAÜ National Digital Identity KAÜ — Hungary's National Digital Identity System Operational 2010s GovTech András Nagy, CTO What It Is KAÜ (Központi Azonosítási Ügynök — Central Authentication Agent) is Hungary's national digital authorisation service. It is the system that authenticates millions of Hungarian citizens when they access government digital services — from tax submissions to healthcare records to administrative portals. KAÜ is the identity backbone of Hungary's digital government. It is not a minor component of the country's digital infrastructure — it is the trust layer that everything else depends on. E-Group's Role KAÜ was designed and implemented personally by András Nagy , Co-founder and CTO of E-Group. This is not a project E-Group contributed to as one of many participants — András Nagy architected the system, led its technical implementation, and built it from the ground up. The egroup.hu management page lists this specifically in András Nagy's professional record: "Designed and implemented E-Government (KAÜ, Hungarian State digital authorization service) in Hungary." András also managed the South East Asian State Digital Authorization Service — demonstrating that E-Group's identity infrastructure expertise extends well beyond Hungary. The Significance Building national digital identity infrastructure at this scale requires a depth of expertise in cryptography, PKI, digital signatures, authentication protocols, and government-grade security that almost no private company possesses. E-Group built this when most European countries were still debating whether digital identity was viable. This work is the direct foundation for E-Group's involvement in eIDAS 2.0 and the European Digital Identity Wallet Consortium. The MyD Wallet explicitly maintains backward compatibility with KAÜ — the two systems are architecturally linked. Academic Roots The cryptographic foundations for this work trace back to 2001, when an E-Group-affiliated researcher began exploring electronic signature legislation at the BME research laboratory. This academic-to-production pipeline — from university research to national infrastructure — is characteristic of how E-Group operates. E-Group clients related to this work include NISZ (National IT Services), OEP (National Health Insurance Fund), Ministry of Interior, and the National Ambulance Service, among others. Project Details System KAÜ — Central Authentication Agent Country Hungary Built By András Nagy, Co-founder & CTO Status Operational Scale Millions of citizens Type National digital identity Related eIDAS 2.0, MyD Wallet Key Clients Gov NISZ — National IT Services Gov Ministry of Interior Health OEP — National Health Insurance Health National Ambulance Service Finance Hungarian National Bank Sources 1 E-Group Management Page — András Nagy profile 2 ELTE-SDKK: E-Group ICT Software Zrt. pages.title: HeliX Health Data Space + FedX — E-Group Record
pages.currentContent: HeliX Health Data Space + FedX — E-Group Record Home Intelligence Rise Thinking About The Record Record Home IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai KAÜ — National Identity HeliX + FedX eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet Medical AI — GraDPaLM Dr. Péter Antal Press Kit Work With Us Record / HeliX Health Data Space + FedX HeliX Health Data Space + FedX Active EU Project 8 Biobanks 50+ Partners FedX Platform What It Is HeliX is a European health data space — a consortium of 50+ partner organisations sharing and analysing health data across institutional boundaries while maintaining full data sovereignty. No patient data leaves the institution that holds it. Instead, AI models travel to the data, train locally, and return aggregated insights. E-Group's FedX platform is the federated learning infrastructure that makes this possible. FedX is the technical layer that allows HeliX partners to run federated queries, train shared models, and conduct cross-biobank analysis — without any institution needing to expose or transfer raw data. Scale and Status FedX is not a prototype or a pilot concept. As confirmed at the International Conference on Systems Biology (ICSB 2025), FedX is operationally validated — running in production across: 8 biobanks across Europe 50+ partner organisations in the HeliX consortium Cross-institution federated queries running in production A Clinical Geneticist at Semmelweis University — one of E-Group's HeliX partners — noted: for the first time, their institution could perform federated queries across multiple institutions without moving the data or compromising patient privacy. Research Output E-Group and BME jointly presented a research poster at ICSB 2025: "Cross-Biobank Analysis by Transformers." This work introduced MQTT — a novel transformer architecture creating unified representations from diverse patient data (genetic, laboratory, prescription) using federated learning across different biobanks. This joint presentation, led by Dr. Péter Antal, exemplifies E-Group's approach: academic rigour combined with production-ready infrastructure. General Assembly in Budapest The HeliX consortium held its second in-person General Assembly (HGA) on 10–11 March 2026 in Budapest, Hungary — hosted at E-Group's facilities. As the primary decision-making body of the consortium, all partner organisations were represented. The HGA convenes every six months per the project's grant agreement. pages.title: eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet — E-Group Record
pages.currentContent: eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet — E-Group Record Home Intelligence Rise Thinking About The Record Record Home IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai KAÜ — National Identity HeliX + FedX eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet Medical AI — GraDPaLM Dr. Péter Antal Press Kit Work With Us Record / eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet Testbed Passed EWC Member eIDAS 1.0 + 2.0 KAÜ Compatible 2024—2026 What It Is The European Digital Identity Wallet (EUDI Wallet) is mandated by the EU's eIDAS 2.0 regulation — by December 2026, every EU member state must provide citizens with a digital identity wallet. E-Group is building Hungary's contribution to this rollout through the MyD Wallet — a microservice-based micro wallet-workflow framework developed for the Hungarian market. E-Group is an active participant in the European Digital Identity Wallet Consortium (EWC) — the large-scale EU pilot programme testing real-world wallet implementation across member states. The Milestone E-Group's MyD Wallet has successfully passed all test scenarios of the eIDAS 2 testbed in the EWC large-scale pilot. This is the formal certification that the MyD implementation meets the EU's technical standards for digital identity wallets. Critically, MyD maintains backward compatibility with eIDAS 1 infrastructure — including Hungary's existing KAÜ citizen gateway and Ügyfélkapu+ system. This means MyD bridges thirty years of Hungarian digital identity work directly into the EU's next-generation identity framework. Technical Architecture MyD is built on OpenID-based specifications for OID4VCI (OpenID for Verifiable Credential Issuance) and OID4VP (OpenID for Verifiable Presentations) — the EU standard protocols for digital credential exchange. The framework supports: Government and market-based applications Integration with the Hungarian Digital Citizen Program (DÁP) Full eIDAS 1.0 and 2.0 dual compliance Cross-border EU interoperability Support for companies implementing, integrating, and deploying wallet solutions EWC General Assembly — Madrid E-Group participated in the EWC General Assembly in Madrid on October 30, 2024 — one of the consortium's primary alignment events. The EWC has completed Phase 1 (covering travel and payment scenarios) and continues work on the Large Scale Pilot through the consortium's three-year project timeline. Why This Matters eIDAS 2.0 is one of the most significant digital infrastructure programmes in European history. By 2026, every EU citizen will have access to a government-recognised digital identity wallet. E-Group is not observing this from the outside — they are one of the architects building it, with a direct line of expertise from KAÜ (eIDAS 1.0, built in the 2010s) to MyD (eIDAS 2.0, testbed-passed 2024). Project Details Product MyD Wallet Consortium European Digital Identity Wallet (EWC) Testbed Status All scenarios passed Compatibility eIDAS 1.0 + 2.0 KAÜ Link Backward compatible EU Deadline December 2026 EWC Assembly Madrid, Oct 30 2024 Standards Protocol OID4VCI Protocol OID4VP Framework ARF (Architecture Reference Framework) Regulation eIDAS 2.0 — Reg. pages.title: Medical AI — GRaDPaLM — Double First Place — E-Group Record
pages.currentContent: Medical AI — GRaDPaLM — Double First Place — E-Group Record Home Intelligence Rise Thinking About The Record Record Home IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai KAÜ — National Identity HeliX + FedX eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet Medical AI — GraDPaLM Dr. Péter Antal Press Kit Work With Us Record / Medical AI — GRaDPaLM — Double First Place Medical AI — GRaDPaLM System Double First Place Research Win Nov 2025 Neumann Colloquium BME TDK GRaDPaLM The Achievement In November 2025, E-Group's medical AI research team achieved back-to-back first-place victories at two prestigious scientific events — within five days of each other. November 14, 2025 — Neumann Colloquium (John von Neumann Computer Society / NJSZT): Best Scientific Article award November 19, 2025 — BME TDK (Budapest University of Technology Scientific Students' Associations): First Place The Team The winning team — all affiliated with E-Group: Benedek Ágota — primary presenter at both events, will present at INTERUNI Conference in the "Medical Molecular Biomarker Research and AI-based Diagnostics and Therapy Development" section Csaba Potyók — co-presenter at the Neumann Colloquium Tamás Mészáros PhD — scientific guidance and co-author Zita Varga M.D. — medical expert ensuring clinical validity Péter Novinszky M.D. — medical expert ensuring clinical validity What GRaDPaLM Is GRaDPaLM stands for Graph Retrieval and Diagnostic Pathway augmented Language Model . It addresses one of the most critical problems in clinical AI: the tendency of large language models to hallucinate — generating plausible-sounding but medically incorrect recommendations. GRaDPaLM solves this by combining two complementary approaches: Knowledge Graph Foundation Model (KGFM) — retrieves information from vast, heterogeneous medical knowledge sources, ensuring recommendations are grounded in verified medical data Guideline Interchange Format (GLIF) — enforces standardised decision paths defined by medical guidelines, allowing step-by-step, transparent reasoning through diagnostic algorithms The result is a clinical AI system that follows standardised decision paths, retrieves from verified sources, and produces recommendations that are both explainable and grounded — reducing hallucinations to a level that clinicians can actually trust. What Comes Next Benedek Ágota will present GRaDPaLM at the upcoming INTERUNI Conference in the "Medical Molecular Biomarker Research and AI-based Diagnostics and Therapy Development" section, with the presentation titled: "Implementation of a Knowledge- and Protocol-based Medical Diagnostic Assistant." Competition Record Event 1 Neumann Colloquium — NJSZT Date 1 November 14, 2025 Award 1 Best Scientific Article Event 2 BME TDK Date 2 November 19, 2025 Award 2 First Place Team Presenter Benedek Ágota Co-presenter Csaba Potyók Scientific Lead Tamás Mészáros PhD Medical Expert Zita Varga M.D. Medical Expert Péter Novinszky M.D. Next Event INTERUNI Conference System Name GRaDPaLM Full Name Graph Retrieval and Diagnostic Pathway augmented Language Model Core Problem LLM hallucinations in clinical AI Approach Knowledge Graph + GLIF diagnostic paths Output Explainable, grounded recommendations Sources 1 E-Group: A Winning Streak in AI Innovation, Nov 28 2025 2 BME TDK 2025 — Scientific Students' Associations competition results 3 Neumann Colloquium 2025 — John von Neumann Computer Society (NJSZT) results Related Records AI Research Dr. Péter Antal — Knight's Cross HealthTech HeliX Health Data Space + FedX EU Project IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai E -Group Intelligence Infrastructure · Est. 1993 The public record of E-Group ICT Software Zrt. pages.title: Dr. Péter Antal — Knight's Cross Laureate — E-Group Record
pages.currentContent: Dr. Péter Antal — Knight's Cross Laureate — E-Group Record Home Intelligence Rise Thinking About The Record Record Home IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai KAÜ — National Identity HeliX + FedX eIDAS 2.0 — MyD Wallet Medical AI — GraDPaLM Dr. Péter Antal Press Kit Work With Us Record / Dr. Péter Antal — Knight's Cross Laureate Dr. Péter Antal — Knight's Cross Laureate Knight's Cross — Aug 19 2025 Associate Professor BME AI Research Group Head E-Group Lead Researcher The Award On August 19, 2025 , Dr. Péter Antal was awarded Hungary's Knight's Cross of the Order of Merit (civilian division) — the highest civilian state recognition Hungary confers. The award recognises his individual achievements in artificial intelligence research and the scientific and innovative spirit that defines E-Group's work. Academic Position Dr. Antal is an Associate Professor at the Department of Artificial Intelligence and Systems Design , Faculty of Electrical Engineering and Informatics (VIK), Budapest University of Technology and Economics (BME). Within BME he holds two leadership positions: Head of the Artificial Intelligence Research Group — since 2019 Head of the Bioinformatics Laboratory (also known as the Computational Biomedicine / ComBine research group — led since 2008) He teaches bioinformatics, intelligent data analysis and decision support, and trustworthy artificial intelligence. Career Timeline 1995 — M.Sc. in Computer Engineering, BME 1998–2002 — Visiting researcher and PhD student, Faculty of Electrical Engineering, KU Leuven (bioinformatics group) 2002–2007 — Teaching assistant then lecturer, Department of Measurement and Information Systems, BME 2008–2011 — Postdoctoral researcher (OTKA — Hungarian Scientific Research Fund) 2008 — Founded Computational Biomedicine (ComBine) research group at BME 2011 — Promoted to Associate Professor 2019 — Appointed Head of AI Research Group at BME December 2024 — Joins E-Group as part-time lead researcher August 19, 2025 — Awarded Knight's Cross of the Order of Merit of Hungary Role at E-Group Since December 2024, Dr. Antal has been strengthening E-Group as a part-time researcher. He actively contributes to R&D and business development, and currently serves as lead researcher on the FedEU.ai project — E-Group's IPCEI-CIS EU project — applying his expertise in federated learning and trustworthy AI. He led the joint E-Group / BME presentation at ICSB 2025 (International Conference on Systems Biology), presenting research on the MQTT transformer architecture for cross-biobank federated analysis. Research Focus Dr. Antal's research centres on large-scale data and knowledge fusion in the life sciences, Bayesian systems analysis of causal and dependency relations, federated learning for privacy-preserving AI, and trustworthy AI governance — with 21 published research works and 164 citations on ResearchGate. Profile Full Name Péter Antal, PhD Title Associate Professor University BME — Budapest University of Technology Department Dept. of AI and Systems Design Research Groups AI Research Group (Head) + Bioinformatics Lab (Head) At BME Since 2002 AI Group Head Since 2019 At E-Group Since December 2024 Recognition Award Knight's Cross of the Order of Merit Division Civilian division Date August 19, 2025 Country Hungary Issuer Hungarian State Sources 1 E-Group: Dr. Péter Antal awarded Knight's Cross, Aug 2025 2 Medtech Events: Dr. Péter Antal biographical profile 3 BME-MIT: Péter Antal — Head of AI Research Group 4 Google Scholar: Péter Antal — publications and citations 5 BME: State Honours August 19, 2025 Related Records EU Project IPCEI-CIS — FedEU.ai HealthTech Medical AI — GRaDPaLM Double First HealthTech HeliX Health Data Space + FedX E -Group Intelligence Infrastructure · Est. 1993 The public record of E-Group ICT Software Zrt. pages.title: Rise — Auto Trigger Demo
pages.currentContent: Rise — Auto Trigger Demo Rise Intelligence Engine — Demo 02 Rise doesn't just write content. It reads the world first. Every piece of content starts with live research — what's happening right now, what people are actually talking about, verified across sources. Then Rise thinks. Then it writes. ⚡ Live research → Cross-verify → Think → Write — every single time Brand Voice & Content Rules 🎨 Content Rules Editable by admins — applied to every POC Edit ↓ Brand Voice Authoritative but human. Confident without arrogance. A world-class scientist who tells great stories. Speaks to smart people as equals — never talks down. Never Write Like This Press releases. "Pleased to announce", "proud to", "excited to share". Opening with the company name or a person's title. Vague claims. Generic corporate-speak nobody reads. Always Write Like This Enter a conversation already happening. Lead with what's surprising. Use a specific fact that makes readers feel informed. Make them want to share it because sharing it makes THEM look smart. Company Positioning eGroup — Budapest, est. 1993. "Thirty years building what AI runs on." FinTech, HealthTech, GovTech, SpaceTech, EnergyTech. Deep tech with 30 years of proof — not a startup, not hype. Save Rules — Apply to Next POC ✓ Saved — next generation uses these rules Connected Systems — Live Events Rise monitors these systems continuously.
